name: jmd-global-stones-monorepo
description: E-commerce platform for JMD Global Stones

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run preview --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
